# Tight-arc boundary: a quarter-circle sweep where the discretized
# aisle produces many short chord-spines. Without path grouping,
# per-chord centering leaves stalls mis-aligned across chord
# boundaries; with grouping on, stalls tile continuously by
# cumulative arc-length.

polygon outer
0,0
200,0
arc 1.0
200,200
0,200
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

set stall-angle=90
----
set stall_angle_deg=90

debug offset_carriers=true
----
debug offset_carriers=true

generate
----
total_stalls: 276

snapshot
----
